title: Shellac flakes closeup
description: Closeup photo of two different colors of shellac flakes, for the shellac article. The one on the left is "Orange #1 Waxy" (the most-used, classic, historically-accurate shellac), and the one on the right is "Dewaxed Bona" shellac.
author: Nuberger13 at en.wikipedia
attribution_md:
Shellac flakes closeup
Closeup photo of two different colors of shellac flakes, for the shellac article. The one on the left is "Orange #1 Waxy" (the most-used, classic, historically-accurate shellac), and the one on the right is "Dewaxed Bona" shellac.

Image: Nuberger13 at en.wikipedia ([source](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Shellac_flakes_closeup.JPG))
License: Public domain
